productDisplayName: Vans Men Rowley SPV Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: vans brings you footwear for the urban youth. Inspired by skate boarders, Rowley SPV shoes come in a lightweight vulcanized skate board friendly design that is geared towards performance. Team these with cargos or jeans and graphic tees. Upper Suede and fabric uppers for durability and comfort Leather overlays on the sides and stitch detailing for added style and reinforcement Slightly padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name embossed on the leather panel behind the collar and brand tab on the side of the lacing eyelets Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Grooved criss-cross pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
